article.body_preview:
DHAKA, June 18, 2023 (BSS) - In response to the declared Monetary Policy for the first half of the fiscal year 2023-24 (July-December 2023) by the Bangladesh Bank, President of Dhaka Chamber of Commerce and Industry (DCCI) Barrister Md Sameer Sattar said that a contractionary MPS will help to revive the financial and private sectors.
